title: cheilanthes mollis
intro: Cheilanthes mollis, also known as the soft rock fern, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Woodsiaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Cheilanthes mollis include its potential to treat various ailments such as bronchitis, asthma, and digestive problems, as well as its use as an anti-diarrheal agent. Herbal preparations of Cheilanthes mollis typically involve infusions or decoctions of the leaves, which can be consumed as teas or used topically to treat skin conditions.
